hero_title: Your donation is the pulse of many lives

hero.title_3: is the pulse of many lives
hero.inputPlaceholder: Enter your city or ZIP code
hero.description: We connect donors with the nearest blood banks quickly and safely. Discover where your help is needed most right now.
hero.inputPlaceholderLabel: Where do you want to donate?

interactiveSearch.title: Find a Blood Bank
interactiveSearch.description: See the nearest collection sites and schedule your visit.
interactiveSearch.address: R. Enéas de Carvalho Aguiar, 155 - Cerqueira César

informationCards.title: Prepare your Donation
informationCards.subtitle: Everything you need to know to make this act of love safely and confidently.

requirements.title: Requirements
requirements.description: Be between 16 and 69 years old, weigh more than 50kg and be well rested. Check the complete list of temporary impediments.

appointment.title: Appointment
appointment.description: Avoid queues and crowds. Choose the best time at your preferred blood bank through our integrated platform.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you have any questions about the donation process, you can contact us through the following channels.
